case_title: EVE BERNSTEIN VS. EUGENE BARNES ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON OCT-18-2023 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT EUGENE BARNES'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT (VIA ZOOM). THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON OCT-18-2023 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT EUGENE BARNES' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED.
